items.title: Middle East crisis live: IDF says Iran has launched missiles towards Israel after strikes on Lebanon
items.summary: Iran had threatened Israel with ‘painful’ response after strikes on southern Beirut that reportedly killed two people and left several more injured Donald Trump also aggressivel...

items.title: Israel Bombs Beirut Outskirts as Fighting With Hezbollah Escalates
items.summary: U.S. efforts for a truce in Lebanon appear to have stalled. Israel accused Hezbollah of firing at Israeli territory. Iran swiftly retaliated.

items.title: West Asia war LIVE: Israel army says territory being targeted by Iranian missiles
items.summary: Iran State Television said that Iran began military operations against Israel in retaliation for Israel's attack on southern Lebanon on June 7, 2026.
